integration_report.integration_summary: All 5 micro-tasks integrated successfully: - MT-1: _safe_resolve() now uses _ALLOWED_ROOTS list with UNC allowlist - MT-2: jm default changed from "G" to "KJ" in _cli_main - MT-3: note = kit_place instead of hardcoded "포장반" in _cli_main None branch - MT-4: _compress_line_nos moved to core/utils.py; imported in both main.py and ui/app.py - MT-5: write_date dead code removed from main.py and ui/app.py; inline import re as _re removed; import re added at top of ui/app.py No import conflicts. All module imports resolve correctly. core/utils.py created successfully.

integration_checks.check: PASS - all from core.utils import _compress_line_nos calls resolve
PASS - get_next_business_day removed from all import lines
PASS - import re as _re removed from ui/app.py
PASS - unknown UNC blocked with ValueError
PASS - note = kit_place in _cli_main; no note = "포장반"
PASS - write_date = get_next_business_day not in main.py
PASS - import re as _re not in ui/app.py
